title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete AI-powered video generation workflow that uses Claude Code to automatically plan, code, generate visuals, produce voiceover, add music, and assemble finished videos from an idea or URL. The system combines Archon as the workflow orchestration engine with HyperFrames for video generation, eliminating the need for separate editors, animators, or voice actors.
